mapper.update: MERGE INTO NF_SCRPPNG_MGT X USING ( SELECT COUNT(*) COUNT FROM NF_SCRPPNG_MGT WHERE CUST_NO = #{custNoS} AND TRAD_NO = #{tradNoS} AND OBJ_INST = #{objInstS} AND OBJ_DOC_CD = #{objDocCdS} ) Y ON ( Y.COUNT > 0 AND X.CUST_NO = #{custNoW} AND X.TRAD_NO = #{tradNoW} AND X.OBJ_INST = #{objInstW} AND X.OBJ_DOC_CD = #{objDocCdW} ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET X.SCRPPNG_DATA = #{scrppngDataU, jdbcType=CLOB}, X.ERR_CD = #{errCdU}, X.ERR_MSG = #{errMsgU}, X.UPD_DT = CURRENT TIMESTAMP, X.SCR_TYPE = #{scrType}, X.CERT_TYPE = #{certType} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( X.CUST_NO, X.TRAD_NO, X.OBJ_INST, X.OBJ_DOC_CD, X.SCRPPNG_DATA, X.ERR_CD, X.ERR_MSG, X.UPD_DT, X.SCR_TYPE, X.CERT_TYPE, X.CERT_TYPE_ERR ) VALUES ( #{custNo}, #{tradNo}, #{objInst}, #{objDocCd}, #{scrppngData, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{errCd}, #{errMsg}, CURRENT TIMESTAMP, #{scrType}, #{certType}, #{certTypeErr} )
